basic_details.job_title: ANIIMS Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS)
basic_details.post_name: Faculty Posts (Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor)
basic_details.short_information: Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 06 July 2026 on the official website andamannicobar.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies for Associate Professor (Cardiology) and Assistant Professor (Cardiology) posts have been announced through the ANIIMS Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Professor (Cardiology): DM/DNB/DrNB(Cardiology). Specific experience and research requirements are detailed in the official notification. Associate Professor (Cardiology): DM/DNB/DrNB(Cardiology). As Assistant Professor in the subject for two years in a recognised medical institution; and (i) have published at least two research publications after appointment as Assistant Professor and must be amongst first three authors; and (ii) have completed the Basic Course in Biomedical Research from medical institution designated by the Commission. Assistant Professor (Cardiology): DM/DNB/DrNB(Cardiology). Have completed the Basic Course in Biomedical Research from recognised medical institution designated by the Commission.

salary_details.pay_scale: Associate Professor (Pay Level 13): Rs 2,99,750/- per month initially + 3% increment annually + Rs. 25,000/- academic/special duty allowance + Rs. 18,000/- HRA. Assistant Professor (Pay Level 12): Rs 2,45,250/- per month initially + 3% increment annually + Rs. 20,000/- academic/special duty allowance + Rs. 16,000/- HRA.
salary_details.details: Associate Professor (Cardiology): Rs 2,99,750/- per month initially + 3% increment annually + Rs. 25,000/- academic/special duty allowance + Rs. 18,000/- HRA. Assistant Professor (Cardiology): Rs 2,45,250/- per month initially + 3% increment annually + Rs. 20,000/- academic/special duty allowance + Rs. 16,000/- HRA.

selection_process: presentation in conferences and performance in interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ANIIMS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.andaman_nicobar_islands_institute_of_med: Faculty Posts (Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor)

Associate Professor (Pay Level 13): Rs 2,99,750/- per month initially + 3% increment annually + Rs. 25,000/- academic/special duty allowance + Rs. 18,000/- HRA. Assistant Professor (Pay Level 12): Rs 2,45,250/- per month initially + 3% increment annually + Rs. 20,000/- academic/special duty allowance + Rs. 16,000/- HRA.

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ANIIMS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Professor (Cardiology): DM/DNB/DrNB(Cardiology). Specific experience and research requirements are detailed in the official notification. Associate Professor (Cardiology): DM/DNB/DrNB(Cardiology). As Assistant Professor in the subject for two years in a recognised medical institution; and (i) have published at least two research publications after appointment as Assistant Professor and must be amongst first three authors; and (ii) have completed the Basic Course in Biomedical Research from medical institution designated by the Commission. Assistant Professor (Cardiology): DM/DNB/DrNB(Cardiology). Have completed the Basic Course in Biomedical Research from recognised medical institution designated by the Commission.

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Associate Professor (Cardiology): Rs 2,99,750/- per month initially + 3% increment annually + Rs. 25,000/- academic/special duty allowance + Rs. 18,000/- HRA. Assistant Professor (Cardiology): Rs 2,45,250/- per month initially + 3% increment annually + Rs. 20,000/- academic/special duty allowance + Rs. 16,000/- HRA.

rows.event: Cut-off date for receiving soft copy of application
Last date for receipt of hard copy of application

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Interview Review of academic, research credentials including publications, academic awards, and research paper, presentation in conferences and performance in interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ANIIMS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANIIMS Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the soft copy of the application via email is 23rd July 2026. The hard copy of the application must also be received by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Assistant Professor post, candidates must possess a DM/DNB/DrNB in Cardiology and have completed the Basic Course in Biomedical Research from a recognized medical institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for ANIIMS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 1000/-. This fee needs to be paid as per the instructions in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Faculty posts at ANIIMS?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview. Candidates' academic and research credentials, including publications and presentations, will also be reviewed.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for an Associate Professor at ANIIMS?
faq.answer: The Associate Professor will receive a consolidated monthly pay of Rs 2,99,750/- initially, with annual increments, academic/special duty allowance, and HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates apply through deputation?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment is open for both contract and deputation basis. For deputation, applications must be submitted through the proper channel with specific required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 3 vacancies have been announced for the Faculty posts, including Associate Professor and Assistant Professor in Cardiology.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for ANIIMS?
faq.answer: The official website for Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences is https://aniims.andamannicobar.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification should be referred to for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories. Government norms will be followed.
